layout.name: idx
layout.title: Index
layout.tooltip: The index of the respawner controlled by these settings.

layout.name: sound
layout.title: Sound Effect
layout.tooltip: The sound that plays when the NPC spawns.

layout.name: npc
layout.title: NPC
layout.tooltip: The NPC spawned once this spawner is triggered. Setting it to Empty disables the respawner.

layout.name: delay
layout.title: Delay
layout.tooltip: Delay between the NPC dying and the NPC respawning.

layout.name: freezeX
layout.title: Use Spawner X
layout.tooltip: If true, the spawner's X coordinate will be used for every instance of the NPC spawned.

layout.name: freezeY
layout.title: Use Spawner Y
layout.tooltip: If true, the spawner's Y coordinate will be used for every instance of the NPC spawned.

layout.name: offscreenX
layout.title: Offscreen X
layout.tooltip: If true, the NPC will attempt to spawn offscreen on the X-Axis.

layout.name: offscreenY
layout.title: Offscreen Y
layout.tooltip: If true, the NPC will attempt to spawn offscreen on the Y-Axis.

layout.name: despawnMethod
layout.title: Despawn Method
layout.tooltip: Effect to despawn the NPC with if the content is set to empty.
